mapper.select: SELECT com_cd_seq ,com_grp_cd_seq ,com_cd ,com_std_cd ,com_cd_nm ,com_cd_desc ,refval01 ,refval02 ,refval03 ,refval04 ,refval05 ,refval06 ,refval07 ,refval08 ,refval09 ,refval10 ,refval11 ,refval12 ,refval13 ,refval14 ,refval15 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,rgst_user_seq ,rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,upt_user_seq ,upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM tb_com_cd WHERE com_grp_cd_seq = #{comGrpCdSeq} ORDER BY sort_seq, com_cd
